Our Expertise

Engineering Excellence Across Every Stage of Your Project.

From the first sketch to the final handover, GEA delivers multidisciplinary engineering, construction, and design services — engineered for modern construction and built to last.

Request ConsultationView Projects
What We Do

A single, accountable partner for every stage of the built environment.

Global Engineering Agency is a multidisciplinary company delivering complete project solutions — from planning, design, and engineering through to construction, systems integration, and property advisory. Sixteen disciplines, one team, one point of accountability.

Our Services

Sixteen disciplines. One integrated team.

01Design & Documentation

Architecture Drawings

Precise architectural drawings that translate ambition into buildable form — from early concept sketches to fully coordinated construction documentation.

  • Concept & schematic design
  • Construction drawing sets
  • Permit & approval documentation
  • 3D visualisation & renders
Learn More
02Construction & Delivery

General Contracting

Single point of accountability for the full construction process — coordinating trades, materials, and schedules to deliver a finished building without compromise.

  • Site mobilisation & supervision
  • Subcontractor coordination
  • Quality control on every trade
  • Handover & snagging
Learn More
03Construction & Delivery

Project Management

Disciplined planning and oversight that keeps every stakeholder aligned, every milestone visible, and every project on time and on budget.

  • Programme & schedule management
  • Budget & cost control
  • Risk & change management
  • Stakeholder reporting
Learn More
04Planning & Costing

BOQ & Cost Estimation

Detailed bills of quantities and cost plans that give clients clarity and confidence before a single foundation is poured.

  • Quantity take-offs
  • Material & labour costing
  • Tender documentation
  • Value engineering review
Learn More
05Planning & Costing

Project Consultation

Independent, technically grounded advice at the earliest stage — helping clients test feasibility before committing capital to a project.

  • Feasibility studies
  • Site & regulatory assessment
  • Technical due diligence
  • Strategic project roadmap
Learn More
06Design & Documentation

Interior Design

Considered interiors that balance material honesty, spatial comfort, and lasting quality — tailored to how each space will actually be used.

  • Space planning & layouts
  • Material & finish specification
  • Custom joinery & fit-out
  • Furniture & lighting design
Learn More
07Design & Documentation

Exterior Design

Facades and envelopes engineered to perform in Rwanda’s climate while giving every building a confident, enduring street presence.

  • Facade concept & detailing
  • Material selection
  • Envelope performance review
  • Elevation drawings
Learn More
08Design & Documentation

Landscaping

Outdoor environments designed as an extension of the building itself — from hardscaping to planting plans suited to the local terrain.

  • Site & grading plans
  • Hardscape & softscape design
  • Irrigation planning
  • Planting specification
Learn More
09Engineering Systems

Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing (MEP)

Fully coordinated MEP systems engineered for reliability and efficiency, integrated seamlessly into the architectural design from day one.

  • MEP system design
  • Load calculations
  • Coordinated shop drawings
  • Commissioning & testing
Learn More
10Engineering Systems

Fire Protection Systems

Life-safety systems designed and installed to code — protecting people and property with detection, suppression, and evacuation planning.

  • Fire detection & alarm design
  • Suppression system installation
  • Emergency egress planning
  • Compliance certification
Learn More
11Engineering Systems

Security Systems

Integrated access control, surveillance, and monitoring systems designed to protect residential, commercial, and institutional properties.

  • CCTV & surveillance design
  • Access control systems
  • Perimeter security planning
  • Monitoring integration
Learn More
12Engineering Systems

HVAC Systems

Climate control systems engineered for comfort and energy efficiency, sized correctly from the first calculation through to final installation.

  • Heat load calculations
  • System design & sizing
  • Ductwork & equipment installation
  • Performance commissioning
Learn More
13Engineering Systems

Solar Energy Solutions

Solar power systems designed to reduce operating costs and improve energy resilience for homes, businesses, and developments.

  • Solar feasibility assessment
  • System design & sizing
  • Installation & grid integration
  • Performance monitoring
Learn More
14Property & Investment

Real Estate Services

Advisory grounded in real technical expertise — helping clients find, evaluate, and acquire property with genuine confidence.

  • Property sourcing & advisory
  • Investment feasibility analysis
  • Acquisition support
  • Portfolio strategy
Learn More
15Property & Investment

Property Refurbishment

Renovation and refurbishment that restores and elevates existing properties — extending their life and unlocking additional value.

  • Condition assessment
  • Refurbishment design
  • Structural upgrades
  • Full renovation delivery
Learn More
16Property & Investment

Property Demolition

Safe, controlled demolition and site clearance carried out to regulatory standard — preparing sites for what comes next.

  • Demolition planning & permits
  • Safe dismantling & clearance
  • Waste & material disposal
  • Site preparation handover
Learn More
How We Work

Our project process.

01

Consultation

Understanding your vision, requirements, and constraints from the outset.

02

Planning

Feasibility, budgeting, and a clear project roadmap before design begins.

03

Design

Architectural, structural, and MEP design developed in full coordination.

04

Execution

Disciplined construction management from groundbreaking to completion.

05

Delivery

Rigorous handover, snagging, and long-term support after completion.

Why Choose Us

Why Clients Choose Global Engineering Agency.

Clients return to GEA project after project — that consistency is our real track record.

01

Experienced Professionals

A qualified, multidisciplinary team with two decades of combined delivery experience.

02

Integrated Solutions

Engineering, construction, materials, and property advisory under one accountable partner.

03

Premium Quality Standards

Every material, finish, and structure held to an uncompromising standard.

04

On-Time Delivery

Disciplined programme management that keeps every build on schedule.

05

Client-Focused Approach

Transparent communication and a genuine partnership from first sketch to handover.

06

End-to-End Project Support

From feasibility to final finish, support that never hands you off.
